summary: Comprehensive backend testing for EchoAid completed. All 27 pytest cases passed (100%) covering auth (register/login/me/logout with httpOnly cookies), mood CRUD, journal text mode, healing parks (Jakarta seeds verified), meditations (list/detail/404), doctors (list + category filter), bookings (create/list/invalid doctor), AI chat via Claude Sonnet 4.5 (send + history + cross-user 403 enforcement), profile updates (sanctuary_preferences/privacy/guardians add+remove), and settings patch. JWT auth + cookie flow validated; cross-tenant isolation confirmed on chat endpoints.

minor.issue: Cookies are set with samesite=none/secure but delete_cookie uses defaults; clients on different domain may still see the cookie until session_token DB row expires. Functionally OK because get_user_by_token validates session expiry; JWT cookie deletion works.

CORS_ORIGINS='*' in .env is parsed and skipped (good), but allow_credentials=True + wildcard would be invalid; current code correctly falls back to FRONTEND_URL + localhost. Consider documenting explicit origins list in .env.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~800 lines and growing; recommend splitting into routers/ (auth, mood, journal, healing, meditation, doctors, bookings, chat, profile) for maintainability.
Password policy is min_length=6 (Pydantic); consider stronger validation (uppercase/digit/symbol) for production.
No brute-force lockout / rate limiting on /api/auth/login — add throttling middleware or per-IP counter.
/api/auth/google-session uses synchronous `requests` inside an async endpoint; should use httpx.AsyncClient to avoid blocking the event loop.
/api/profile/guardian uses raw request.json() with no Pydantic validation — accepts any payload silently. Add a Pydantic GuardianIn model.
JWT_SECRET committed in /app/backend/.env (acceptable for dev only). Ensure production deploy rotates this and uses a vault.
create_access_token has no refresh token mechanism; 7-day access tokens cannot be revoked except via cookie clear — acceptable for MVP.
test_credentials: admin@echoaid.com / Admin@EchoAid2026 (seeded on startup, verified). Test users created on the fly as test_<uuid>@echoaid.com / Test@2026!
seed_data_creation: Tests create mood/journal/booking/chat records under newly-registered ephemeral users (test_<uuid>@echoaid.com). Guardian entries are added and removed within the same test. No cleanup of ephemeral users (acceptable; isolated by random email).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All EchoAid backend endpoints are healthy. Test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py is reusable; run with `pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v`. Claude chat integration (Emergent LLM key) works end-to-end and returns Indonesian/English mixed responses. /api/journal/transcribe (Whisper) was skipped per instructions — needs real audio bytes. Google OAuth callback skipped (real flow). For frontend testing, use BASE_URL from frontend/.env REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL and remember cookies are samesite=none/secure (need credentials: include).
